meta.description: EDEN Service Validator — unified service profiles and global keyword lists. This file is the single source of truth, replacing services_default_queries.csv, validation_config.json, and the hardcoded 'patterns' dict in Validator.py.

global._comment: Cross-cutting keyword lists used by _classify_html_response(). Formerly in validation_config.json.

OAI-PMH.title: Open Archives Initiative - Protocol for Metadata Harvesting

Static OAI.title: OAI Static Repository
Static OAI.comment: A static XML file, not a live OAI-PMH server. The base URL should point directly to the static repository XML file.

REST.title: Representational State Transfer
REST.comment: Generic REST endpoint. A 400 Bad Request on the base URL is acceptable — it indicates the server is live and responding to REST-style requests, even if the root path requires parameters.

ERDDAP.title: ERDDAP
ERDDAP.comment: ERDDAP's /index.json returns a JSON object with a 'table' key listing all datasets.

SOAP.title: Simple Object Access Protocol
SOAP.comment: Appending '?wsdl' to a SOAP endpoint URL typically returns the WSDL service description.

SWORD.title: Simple Web-service Offering Repository Deposit
SWORD.comment: SWORD is primarily for depositing content and will often be behind an auth wall. A 401 Unauthorized is expected and indicates the endpoint is live.

OpenAPI.title: OpenAPI Specification
OpenAPI.comment: Tries /openapi.json on the endpoint base URL. Multiple spec versions (2.0, 3.0.x, 3.1.x) are all captured by the same body signatures.

IIIF Search API.title: IIIF Content Search API
IIIF Search API.comment: The API should return a JSON error document (e.g. a IIIF error manifest) when queried without parameters. Body signatures are tentative and may need refinement with real examples.

IIIF Presentation API.title: IIIF Presentation API
IIIF Presentation API.comment: Body signatures are tentative and may need refinement with real examples.

LDN.title: Linked Data Notifications
LDN.comment: Inbox URL discovered via HEAD/GET on target resource: Link header rel="http://www.w3.org/ns/ldp#inbox". GET on Inbox returns JSON-LD listing notifications via ldp:contains. POST to Inbox sends notification (Content-Type: application/ld+json); expects 201 Created or 202 Accepted. A 405 Method Not Allowed on the inbox itself is accepted as valid — it confirms the inbox exists but GET requires authentication.

OpenSearch.title: Open Search
OpenSearch.comment: STUB: Probe and body signature details not yet defined. To be completed.

FAIRiCat.title: FAIRiCat: Supporting Discovery of a Repository's Interoperability Affordances
FAIRiCat.comment: STUB: Probe and body signature details not yet defined. To be completed.

LAS.title: Live Access Server
LAS.comment: STUB: Probe and body signature details not yet defined. To be completed.

AMPQ.title: Advanced Message Queuing Protocol
AMPQ.comment: STUB: AMQP is a binary wire protocol; HTTP-based probing is not applicable. Validation strategy TBD.

MQTT.title: Message Queuing Telemetry Transport
MQTT.comment: STUB: MQTT is a TCP-based binary protocol; HTTP-based probing is not applicable. Validation strategy TBD.

XMPP.title: Extensible Messaging and Presence Protocol
XMPP.comment: STUB: XMPP is an XML-stream TCP protocol; HTTP-based probing is not applicable. Validation strategy TBD.

TAPIR.title: TDWG Access Protocol for Information Retrieval
TAPIR.comment: STUB: Probe and body signature details not yet defined. To be completed.

DIGIR.title: Distributed Generic Information Retrieval
DIGIR.comment: STUB: Probe and body signature details not yet defined. To be completed.

OGC-CSW.title: OGC Catalogue Service for the Web
OGC-CSW.comment: Probe suffix is a suggested GetCapabilities query — body signatures come from Validator.py.

OGC-WMTS.title: OpenGIS Web Map Tile Service
OGC-WMTS.comment: STUB: Probe suffix and body signatures are inferred from the OGC pattern — to be verified with real endpoints.

OGC-WFS.title: OGC Web Feature Service
OGC-WFS.comment: STUB: Body signatures inferred — to be verified with real endpoints.

OGC-SOS.title: OGC Sensor Observation Service
OGC-SOS.comment: STUB: Body signatures inferred — to be verified with real endpoints.

OGC-WCS.title: OGC Web Coverage Service
OGC-WCS.comment: STUB: Body signatures inferred — to be verified with real endpoints.

IVOA-SCS.title: Simple Cone Search
IVOA-SCS.comment: STUB: Probe and body signature details not yet defined. To be completed.

IVOA-SIA.title: Simple Image Access
IVOA-SIA.comment: STUB: Probe and body signature details not yet defined. To be completed.

IVOA-SSA.title: Simple Spectral Access
IVOA-SSA.comment: STUB: Probe and body signature details not yet defined. To be completed.

IVOA-SLAP.title: Simple Line Access Protocol
IVOA-SLAP.comment: STUB: Probe and body signature details not yet defined. To be completed.

IVOA-TAP.title: Table Access Protocol
IVOA-TAP.comment: STUB: Probe and body signature details not yet defined. To be completed.

IVOA-VOSpace.title: VOSpace, the IVOA interface to distributed storage
IVOA-VOSpace.comment: STUB: Probe and body signature details not yet defined. To be completed.

NetCDF.title: NetCDF (OPeNDAP)
NetCDF.comment: text/html is too generic to trust alone. Both Content-Type AND at least one body signature must match to avoid false positives (require_body_and_ct: true). The .html suffix is appended because OPeNDAP dataset pages expose DAS/DDS metadata at that path.

FTP.title: File Transfer Protocol
FTP.comment: Real ftp:// URLs are validated via ftplib, not HTTP requests (use_ftp_validator: true). HTTP URLs that return an FTP-style directory listing (Apache mod_autoindex, etc.) are flagged as invalid (detect_http_wrapped_ftp: true). Status codes for FTP are synthesised HTTP-like values: 200 = successful connection + directory listing, 550 = path not found or connection error.
